programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP83
programme.desc: It's time to have a bit of fun, todays MasterClass sees all the eliminated contestants return.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP84
programme.desc: The final 2 will have to compete in 3 rounds to prove that they are worthy of the MasterChef title.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: MasterChef New Zealand returns for its fourth season.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - EP2
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face two sudden death challenges to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Master Hangi
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion, then face a team hangi challenge on Mokoia Island.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Mexican
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook authentic Mexican dishes for guest chef Jose Carlos de la Macorra.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Biggest Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face the biggest mystery box challenge ever.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - The Last Supper
programme.desc: The Top 13 contestants cook the meal they would choose for their Last Supper.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants cook for 1800 passengers aboard cruise ship Dawn Princess.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - A Culinary Journey
programme.desc: The Top 11 MasterChef contestants visit Kauri Cliffs resort in Northland for a MasterClass.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Nose to Tail
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a nose-to-tail challenge in which each must cook a different cut of pork.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Go Protein
programme.desc: Guest chef Eugene Hamilton from Euro restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook 3 protein-packed main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants bake a sponge cake for guest chef Natalie Oldfield.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking Bonanza
programme.desc: Guest chef Sean Armstrong from Auckland bakery Loaf joins MasterChef judges to bake three delicious desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Jetstar Around The World
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants must each cook a dish from nine different Jetstar airline destinations.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Around the World
programme.desc: Guest chef Sergio Maglione from Toto restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook dishes from around the world.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Dolphin Island
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants face an invention test at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cooking With Fire
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws joins MasterChef judges to cook three barbecue dishes at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Turduckenqua
programme.desc: The Top Seven contestants tackle a Turduckenqua–quail stuffed inside chicken, inside duck, inside turkey.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Old School Classics
programme.desc: Guest chef Martin Bosley joins MasterChef judges to cook three classic main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Wither Hills Vineyard Barbecue
programme.desc: The Top Six contestants compete in a barbecue challenge at Wither Hills vineyard in Marlborough.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Vineyard Barbecue
programme.desc: Guest chef Rex Morgan joins the MasterChef judges for a barbecue at Wither Hills vineyard in Marlborough.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Dessert and Cocktail
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must replicate an intricate dessert created by Christchurch chef Andrew Brown.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Just Dessert
programme.desc: Guest chefs Andrew Brown and Natalie Oldfield join Josh Emett to create three stunning desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Ultimate Invention Test
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants must each invent a dish for guest chef Ben Bayly.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Mothers Of Invention
programme.desc: Guest chef Ben Bayly joins the MasterChef judges to invent three delicious main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - French Cafe and Degustation
programme.desc: The top three contestants cook a six-course degustation meal at The French Café.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP30
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP31
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (11 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (12 out of 39)

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Signature Dish
programme.desc: In the season’s final Masterclass, Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook three signature dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Grand Final
programme.desc: The two finalists face four epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: After a Toad in the Hole Masterclass from top chef John Torode, the four cooks try their hand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: After a Masterclass in Thai chicken cakes from top chef John Torode, the four cooks try their hand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: Whose dessert will launch presenters John and Nadia in to sweet orbit?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: After a scrummy Berry pudding Masterclass from top chef John Torode, the four cooks have a bash.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: With only two semi final places up for grabs, the competition gets serious.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: Four aspiring chefs compete for a place in the quarter-final.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: After a scrummy Masterclass in scotch pancakes from top chef John Torode, it's the four cooks' turn.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: With a quarter final place to win, the competition heats up further as they make their tastiest food.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: With a quarter final place up for grabs, the competition reaches boiling point as they go all out to impress.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP10
programme.desc: In the second quarter-final, four heat winners compete to be the best cook in the country.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs must cook lunch for Doctor Who and his companion.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: They must prepare lunch for pop band JLS. Will their food be a hit with the boys?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP13
programme.desc: The four best chefs battle it out to become crowned Junior Masterchef Champion 2010.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: From over 5,000 Applicants the top 50 Junior cooks gather for the first challenges of the Junior MasterChef Series.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: The remaining kids have their chance to cook their best dishes for a chance to make it through to the top 20.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: The top 20 learn that they will be cooking in an invention test with two core ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: The excited top 12 arrive at the MasterChef Kitchen for the first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: In their first offsite challenge, the kids are divided into teams to take over a High School tuck shop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: 10 kids from our top 50 join us for the first Cook-along MasterClass in the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: In week 2 the kids find out that they have 3 more chances to win points before the first elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: Today 4 kids will be going home and 8 will move onto the second stage in the Junior MasterChef competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: It’s MasterClass time and 12 lucky students join Gary, George and Anna.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP110
programme.desc: The scoreboard has been wiped clean and to earn points The top 8 faces a basic skills test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The Blue Team Sofia, Jack, Cassidy & Nick face a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: In Today’s MasterClass the Judges are joined by 6 Members of the Stephanie Alexander Kitchen Garden program.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - High Value Family
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with life-changing money on the line!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - There's Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Five Dollar Redemption
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal history collides on stage when Artis Jackson gets the chance to redeem his family’s honor.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Beard Or No Beard
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Happy Howie Days
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back after 10 years with a heart-warming holiday special.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - It Takes Two
programme.desc: Mother, teacher, and former marine Jade Thomas is all about family.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Southern Charm
programme.desc: Witness an ultimate television cliffhanger as Robert Evans fills the stage with southern charm.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Entrepreneur, Ally Teixeira has sweet dreams that will change the face of the ice cream industry forever.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.
